title: Add MoodCanvas AI to image
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [MoodCanvas AI](https://moodcanvasai.netlify.app/) to image
- Generate aesthetic mood boards in MoodCanvas AI from a single concept or theme. Uses the Pollinations Image API to create visual collections.

Fixes #11010

gist.headline: Curating the hive's mood
gist.blurb: MoodCanvas AI just sprouted in the greenhouse! Now you can generate entire aesthetic mood boards from a single concept using the Pollinations Image API.
gist.summary: Added MoodCanvas AI to the community showcase, a new app that generates aesthetic mood boards from a single concept using the Pollinations Image API.
gist.impact: Creators can now use MoodCanvas AI to instantly generate cohesive visual collections and mood boards powered by our infrastructure.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee wearing a tiny painter's beret, pinning small glowing pixel images to a cork mood board. A chunky retro monitor nearby displays a color palette.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, pinning small glowing pixel images to a wooden mood board. A chunky retro monitor nearby displays a color palette. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and peach pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, pinning small glowing pixel images to a wooden mood board. A chunky retro monitor nearby displays a color palette. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and peach pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
